_README: Golden scenarios for /eval. hook_scenarios are deterministic and run by run-evals.sh (free); a hook that isn't installed is SKIPped, not failed. agent_scenarios cost claude -p tokens and are run by the /eval skill, scored on require_markers (regex, case-insensitive) NOT exact text. Keep this set SMALL and FIXED; add one whenever a real miss reveals a gap.

hook_scenarios.desc: staging a .env must block the commit
an API token in source must block
a clean source file must pass
PROJECT_STATE.md content must be injected as additionalContext
a project with no state file must get the /bootstrap-state nudge

agent_scenarios.fixture: A function that builds a SQL query by string-concatenating an untrusted request parameter, e.g. `db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = " + req.query.id)`.
A try/catch where the catch block is empty (swallows the error silently).
A request to add a CSV-export endpoint to an existing REST API (new route; touches auth, serialization, and pagination).
A new pure function with non-trivial branching (e.g. a tiered discount calculator) and NO accompanying test file.
